# Daniel Short - Agentic Portfolio Facts

## Identity
- Name: Daniel Short
- Role: Data Scientist
- Site: https://www.danielshort.me

## Core Skills
- NLP: production text pipelines, model-driven automation, insight extraction
- Computer Vision: restoration workflows, handwriting/shape recognition, image preprocessing
- ETL/Data Engineering: incremental pipelines, anomaly surfacing, business-facing reporting systems

## Business Impact Metrics
- 500% KPI gains delivered through data productization and analytics strategy
- 200+ hours/year saved by automation replacing manual reporting workflows
- 750% traffic lift achieved in prior growth analytics engagement
- 24% retail loss reduction via ETL + risk triage implementation

## Experience Highlights
- Visit Grand Junction: analytics, reporting, and growth-focused measurement
- Target: operational analytics and automation-oriented data workflows

## Flagship Projects
- Retail Loss ETL
  - Outcome: 24% reduction in loss
  - Method: integrated POS/inventory/incident ETL + anomaly triage
- Edge AI Handwriting Recognition
  - Outcome: sub-10ms target latency
  - Method: client-side inference architecture with ONNX runtime patterns
- Computer Vision Document Restoration
  - Outcome: improved legibility and publish-ready outputs
  - Method: generative restoration pipeline for watermark/noise cleanup
